notes: Standard rolled homogeneous armor. Reference material for all penetration models. MIL-A-12560 specification covers RHA plate from 0.25 to 6.0 inches thickness, 260-320 BHN range. RHAe = 1.0 by definition as the reference material.

source.methodology: Reference material: RHAe=1.0 by definition. Hardness per MIL-DTL-12560 class 1 (260-320 BHN). Density per standard steel.
